title: Why Did Jesus Speak In CODE?
summary: This interview excerpt discusses Jesus's communication style, exploring why he spoke in parables and 'mysteries' rather than plainly. The conversation touches on whether Jesus was intentionally cryptic like a Straussian philosopher, or whether his complex messaging was designed to resonate across different times and contexts.

key_claims.claim: Jesus was the ultimate heretic of his time
The Greek word 'musteria' indicates Jesus was supposed to speak in mysteries
Jesus wanted to produce complex messages of multiple dimensions that would resonate across many different places and periods of time
